changelog:
Talken 1.3

✨ New:
- Group Chats: create a group and message several people at once — still fully peer-to-peer, no central server sees your messages.
- Add people by email and start chatting with contacts you meet in groups.

🔧 Improvements:
- App data now lives in your per-user AppData folder for more reliable storage and smoother updates.
- Lighter, faster login with fewer server round-trips.

🐛 Fixes:
- Various reliability and stability improvements.

📝 Notes:
Thanks for using Talken!
